name: git
description:
Git repository browser with branch-based access.
- Browse branches, read files at any ref, search across repository
- Exec actions (readwrite): `diff`, `create-branch`, `commit`, `merge`
- Virtual `.log/` tree exposes commit history per branch
- Path structure: `/{branch}/{file-path}` (branch `/` encoded as `~`)

notes: Accesses local git repositories; readwrite mode creates worktrees and can commit
